voice: Our tone is warmly inviting and speaks directly to the senses, evoking the vibrant aromas and comforting tastes of the Levant. We aim for authenticity and approachability, focusing on the freshness and quality of our ingredients.
logo_style_brief: A modern, minimalist emblem featuring a stylized olive leaf or branch, paired with clean, approachable typography. Should convey freshness and tradition with a contemporary feel.
photo_style_tokens: overhead shot, rustic ceramic bowls, wooden cutting boards, fresh herbs, soft dappled sunlight, terracotta accents, natural textures, vibrant and inviting, shallow depth of field, 35mm look

facts_from_brief.Desired Outcome: Visually appealing, user-friendly menu that enhances customer experience
facts_from_brief.Key Requirements: Layout design, easy navigation, essential menu details

invented: Specific color palette names and hex codes
